mapper.select: SELECT * FROM place_anchor_override WHERE enabled = TRUE AND LOWER(TRIM(match_name)) = LOWER(TRIM(#{name})) AND ( match_city IS NULL OR match_city = '' OR LOWER(TRIM(match_city)) = LOWER(TRIM(#{city})) ) AND ( match_country IS NULL OR match_country = '' OR LOWER(TRIM(match_country)) = LOWER(TRIM(#{country})) ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN match_city IS NULL OR match_city = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, CASE WHEN match_country IS NULL OR match_country = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, id DESC LIMIT 1
